movesList.name: o
inputs: o  o         jump backwards     vertical jump     jump forward

movesList.name: o-- n --o
inputs: block/go back         neutral          go forward

movesList.name: o
inputs: o  o         blocking crouch     normal crouch    forward crouch/crawl*

movesList.name: up
inputs: = up joystick motion

movesList.name: bk
inputs: = hold joystick in blocking direction

movesList.name: fw
inputs: = joystick forward motion

movesList.name: DP
inputs: = uppercut joystick motion
